message:
data(audit): record WASM ABI + browser stream audits (all SOUND)

Both files are cfg(wasm32) only — usize==u32 on target, so u32 casts
are no-op. ReadableStream/WritableStream Drop impls correct.

Session total: 171 files. 9 bugs fixed.
